title: EvidenceContainer
description: Schema for EvidenceContainer in Nuix REST API

name.description: Sets the name for the evidence container that is created during ingestion.

customMetadata.description: Sets a map of custom metadata for the evidence container.

encoding.description: Sets the encoding for the evidence container. If the encoding is not set the default system encoding will be used.

custodian.description: Sets the name of the initial custodian for the data.

timeZone.description: Sets the time zone for the evidence container. If the time zone is not set the system's default time zone will be used.

description.description: Sets the description for the evidence container.

locale.description: Sets the locale for the evidence container. Some file types and named entities require a locale for them to be ingested accurately. If not set then the system's default locale will be used. Format is that required by IETF BCP 47 (e.g. 'en-US').
